a.xlink:title: Calculate Metabolic Pathway heterogeneity.
This process calculates the pathway activities in different groups and subsets.
This process takes Seurat object as input and pass it to the next processes in the `ScrnaMetabolicLandscape` group.
This process performs enrichment analysis for the metabolic pathways for each group in each subset.
Cluster the TCR/BCR clones by their CDR3 sequences
Load the single cell TCR/BCR data into a `scRepertoire` compatible object
Separate T and non-T cells and select T cells; or separate B and non-B cells and select B cells.
Top expressing genes for clusters of all cells.
Load, prepare and apply QC to data, using `Seurat`
Cluster all cells, including T cells/non-T cells and B cells/non-Bcells using Seurat.
Annotate all or selected T/B cell clusters.
Map the seurat object to reference
Tessa is a Bayesian model to integrate T cell receptor (TCR) sequence profiling with transcriptomes of T cells.
Markers for clusters of all cells.
Calculate the module scores for each cell
List sample information and perform statistics
Find markers between different groups of cells
Markers for clusters of all or selected T/B cells.
Top expressing genes for clusters of all or selected T/B cells.
Cluster all cells or selected T/B cells selected by `TOrBCellSelection`.
